instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Does Life Insurance cover HIV-positive people?
When you least expect it, life can throw unexpected curves that challenge your usual state of being. One such example would be receiving a diagnosis of being HIV-positive. You may immediately become concerned about your family’s financial security upon receiving such news. You may also consider buying life insurance if you do not have one already.
Now, a life insurance cover for HIV-positive people is vital, since one of your key concerns would be your family’s financial safety in your absence. Life insurance can ensure that your family has a financial backup to depend on in your absence. The sum assured can help your loved ones to live a quality life and repay any liabilities.
If you already have life insurance, you might wonder if your insurance company will provide coverage to your nominee in case you breathe your last due to AIDS. If you don’t have life insurance, you might be stressed and wondering whether any insurance company will sell you one.
Keep reading to know the answers to such common doubts concerning life insurance coverage for AIDS-
Can people with HIV/AIDS get life insurance?
In India, life insurance companies cannot deny life insurance coverage to individuals with HIV/AIDS unless there are actuarial studies to support otherwise*. Insurance companies are advised to stop discriminating against people with HIV/AIDS. The decision has been made in accordance with ‘The Human lmmunodeficiency Virus (HIV) and Acquired lmmune Deficiency Syndrome (AIDS) (Prevention and Control) Act, 2017*. Any HIV-positive individual cannot be rejected for an application for a life insurance policy, by any life insurance company, on the grounds of their condition. A life insurance cover for an HIV-positive individual can be availed directly by contacting the insurance company.
How do people diagnose as HIV-positive apply for Life Insurance?
You can apply for a life insurance policy online or through an insurance agent. The process of applying for life insurance is the same for HIV and non-HIV individuals. The only difference might be that HIV-positive individuals may have to submit all the relevant documents regarding their condition. Ensure that you are well aware of the inclusions and exclusions of the policy before purchasing one.
What happens to my life insurance if I get diagnosed HIV-positive after purchase?
For such cases, the insurance company cannot reject or deny any claims on the grounds of the condition. The underwriting and claim settlement guidelines at the time of purchase of the policy will be applicable even if the policyholder tests HIV-positive after purchasing the life insurance plan.
Is life insurance cover for AIDS / HIV-positive individuals expensive?
As mentioned above, any HIV-positive individual can buy life insurance. However, if you buy life insurance after being diagnosed with AIDS, your condition may affect your premium. Apart from your health, your premiums are based on several other factors. These factors include age, gender, family history, and other personal aspects that affect your life span. Also, ensure that you truthfully declare all the information about your health to the life insurance company. After being diagnosed with AIDS, life insurance can prove beneficial to secure the lives of your loved ones. If you lie to your life insurance company about your diagnosis, in your absence, there might be issues your nominee would have to face at the time of claim.
Does critical illness insurance cover HIV/AIDS?
While there is life insurance cover available for HIV-positive people, critical illness plans work differently. Critical illness insurance provides coverage for specific illnesses and sicknesses. The IRDAI has provided a list of specific diseases and conditions that can be covered under a critical illness insurance plan. According to the list given by the insurance regulatory board of the country, a critical illness insurance plan does not cover Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome (AIDS) and Human Immune deficiency Virus (HIV) infection^.
Conclusion
Every individual wants to secure the lives of their family members, more so if they are diagnosed with a potentially life-threatening condition of HIV/AIDS. A life insurance cover for HIV-positive people can act as a financial backup that your family can rely on in your absence. It can ensure that the life of your loved ones is not hampered negatively under any circumstance. While buying a life insurance policy, ensure that you read the terms and conditions thoroughly before proceeding with your purchase. It is always better to read the fine print and make an informed decision accordingly.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789
Sources - *https://www.irdai.gov.in/admincms/cms/whatsNew_Layout.aspx?page=PageNo2105&flag=1#:~:text=pricing%20the%20risk.-,3.,any%20claim%2C%20on%20such%20grounds.
^https://www.irdai.gov.in/ADMINCMS/cms/Uploadedfiles/Critical%20Illness%20Insurance%20Policy.pdf
